subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, inasmuch as God hath named thee the First Pillar of the twin Names derived from this Name, whereat all have been struck with terror [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فطوبی لک بما سماک الله برکن الاول من الاسمین من هذا الاسم الذی منه فزع کل من
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell
